arts.ttl: Barcelona's goalkeeper plan that directly impacts Wojciech Szczesny
arts.sum: Barcelona have made a decision on the future of multiple goalkeepers, including Wojciech Szczesny and Inaki Pena.

arts.ttl: LaLiga injury news, predicted lineups, fantasy updates
arts.sum: Find out who is missing through injury and who is in a race against time to prove their fitness in Spain's LaLiga this weekend.

Barcelona are on an impressive run of form as they continue their chase to lift the La Liga title. Hansi Flick's side have won their last six games in the league, and are unbeaten in all competitions ...

arts.ttl: Deco offers fresh update on Ansu Fati’s Barcelona future
arts.sum: Barcelona sporting director Deco has denied the club are already looking for a way to offload Ansu Fati this summer. Fati is struggling for game time at Barcelona this season, leading to speculation he will be shown the exit door at the end of the campaign.

arts.ttl: ‘Raphinha is a Ballon d’Or contender’ - Brazil boss Dorival Jr
arts.sum: Brazil boss Dorival Jr has lavished praise on Raphinha and says the Barcelona star is a genuine contender for the Ballon d’Or. “Raphinha is a Ballon d’Or contender,” he told a press conference after naming his latest Brazil squad.

arts.ttl: Barcelona react to Wojciech Szczęsny’s masterclass vs Benfica
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga giants Barcelona are preparing a contract renewal offer to goalkeeper Wojciech Szczęsny. This, of course, comes fresh off a night to remember for the Pole…

arts.ttl: Barcelona star Ter Stegen publicly announces separation from wife
arts.sum: Sidelined Barcelona star Marc-André ter Stegen has on Thursday announced his separation from his wife. This comes by way of a statement across the German’s social media platforms. Ter Stegen,…

arts.ttl: Pedri confirms plans to give Man of the Match award to Barcelona teammate
arts.sum: Barcelona star Pedri has confirmed his intention to hand his latest Man of the Match award to a fellow member of Hansi Flick’s squad. The player in question? Wojciech Szczęsny.…
